title: anthemis tuberculata subsp. turolensis
intro: Anthemis tuberculata subsp. turolensis, also known as Turolensis chamomile, is a subspecies of the Anthemis tuberculata plant, a type of daisy-like flowering plant native to Spain. The medicinal properties of Anthemis tuberculata subsp. turolensis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in soothing skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant are numerous, including its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality, as well as its potential to alleviate digestive issues and menstrual cramps. Anthemis tuberculata subsp. turolensis can be consumed as a herbal tea or used in topical preparations, such as creams and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
